title: Made In Heaven
description: Accelerate time, just like from JoJo's!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5ksa21Ebf9s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


To enable time acceleration do either one of these commands:

```
/madeinheaven
/mih
```


To stop this functionality, write either one of these commands:
```
/madeinheaven stop 
/mih stop
```
